lightweight.description: Minimal config-only setup: git, vim, inputrc. Only the listed files run — no advanced/heavy installs.

editors.description: Configure all editors: Vim, Sublime Text, Sublime Merge, VS Code, Zed, plus shell launchers.

browsers.description: Browser tweaks (DOM/CSS hacks via Stylus + per-browser config) plus CLI launchers for Brave, Chrome, Edge, Vivaldi, Opera, Arc, Chromium.

terminal.description: Bash and shell tooling: readline (inputrc), fzf, autocomplete complete-spec.

prompt.description: Shell prompt + navigation: Starship prompt install/config and zoxide (smarter cd).
